title: Netherite Remastered Tools
description: This texture pack changes the regular Netherite tools to their upgraded version with Amethysts.
body:
**Netherite Remastered Tools**

• This texture pack transforms the appearance of Netherite tools, replacing their standard textures with enhanced versions, inlaid with radiant amethysts. In addition to adding amethyst inserts, the texture pack radically changes the color palette and shape of the tools, giving them a unique and exquisite look.A special feature of this texture pack is that all the amethysts adorning the tools emit a mystical glow at night, creating an enchanting atmosphere.
